semantic_description: array_last returns the final element of an input integer array. The contract requires n >= 1, Zlength(l) == n, and full ownership of IntArray::full(a, n, l). The implementation is straight-line code with no branches or loops: it reads a[n - 1] and returns that value. It does not modify memory, so the postcondition preserves the same full array predicate and relates the return value to l[n@pre - 1].
